style_note: This is Tile Africa's own name for what we've been calling 'Urban' - neutral greys, monochromatic, industrial-practical.
known_gaps: No built-in/inset bath exists in Tile Africa's Modern Metro collection - built-in baths sourced from the general built-in baths category on 2026-07-10 (Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection).

Wall tile: Modern Metro's own collection has no wall tile at all - all three tiers sourced from the wider catalogue (grey/monochrome match). Matrix Grey Matt price dropped from R239.99 to R189.99/m2 as of 2026-07-10, moving it from premium to budget tier.
